summary: The weekly review pulse indicates that 30% of users are experiencing transaction and payment issues, 25% are dissatisfied with the user experience and interface, 20% are having trouble with account management and setup, and 25% are unhappy with customer support and features. Users are complaining about problems with cashback, high transaction fees, and poor customer support. Some users appreciate the app's functionality and ease of use, but many are frustrated with the constant changes to the UI/UX.
themes: [{"name": "Transaction and Payment Issues", "percentage": 30}, {"name": "User Experience and Interface", "percentage": 25}, {"name": "Account Management and Setup", "percentage": 20}, {"name": "Customer Support and Features", "percentage": 25}]
quotes: ["I will give 3 star because this app very first time give more cashback but now cashback rate is very low.", "INDmoney offers useful features, but constant UI/UX changes make it frustrating to use.", "I thought you would give me cashback like 200 rs for transaction above 1000 rs but you didn't give me any of the rewards, so it is better to uninstall you."]
action_items: ["Improve the cashback system to provide more consistent rewards to users.", "Streamline the UI/UX to reduce frustration and make the app more user-friendly.", "Enhance customer support to address user complaints and issues in a timely and effective manner."]
